title: NORTHWEST CATHOLIC COUNSELING CENTER - 211info
text: NORTHWEST CATHOLIC COUNSELING CENTER NORTHWEST CATHOLIC COUNSELING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers counseling regardless of faith or finances. Services include counseling, classes, and workshop for individuals, couples, and families. Services focus on issues such as anxiety, grief, depression, trauma, sexuality, conflicted relationships, and stress. 8383 NE Sandy Boulevard Suite 205 Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-6pm, Friday 9am-4pm; other times by appointment Email (503) 253-0964 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 253-0964 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for initial intake, which is a 15-20 minute interview. Waitlist is currently 8-10 weeks to be scheduled with a counselor. FEES: Accepts most private insurance. Sliding scale fee available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Mandarin AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-7:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Off the I-205 Killingsworth/Columbia interchange Services: Conjoint Counseling Family Counseling Individual Counseling Marriage and Relationships Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTHWEST CATHOLIC COUNSELING CENTER
